modmenu.summaryTranslation.lava_boat_clu: Fixes lava boat clutch mechanic, I guess
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.lava_boat:
Restores lava boat clutch mechanic that got fixed in 1.21.5.

On first lava contact the boat gets a short immunity time, so player can land on its hitbox.

Now you can do lava clutches like Dream but in newer versions!
config.lava_boat_clutch.title: Lava Boat Clutch Fix Settings
